hotels.name: Hotel Vinifera Wine & Spa Balatonfüred
hotels.payment_policy: Payment policy: The full balance (or remaining amount after prepayment) is On departure day.
hotels.local_tax: Local tax: 710 Ft / person / night (1.86 € / person / night) of the reservation value (for guests aged 18), included in the full price and payable on site.(payable on site)
hotels.description: The Hotel Vinifera Wine & Spa is a five-star wellness hotel located 1,000 m from the Balaton shore in Balatonfüred, a sparkling cultural city on the northern shore of Balaton, where guests can get to know the wine culture and taste of the region in addition to relaxing.

hotels.name: Hotel Golden Lake Resort Balatonfüred
hotels.payment_policy: Payment policy: The full balance (or remaining amount after prepayment) is On arrival day.
hotels.local_tax: Local tax: 710 Ft / person / night (1.86 € / person / night) of the reservation value (for guests aged 18), included in the full price and payable on site.(payable on site)
hotels.description:
Dear Guests,

**** Hotel Golden Lake Resort located in Balatonfüred, a former Roman settlement, now a marvellous city which brings back remote times. The city dwellers and their guests have always led their lives and habits in line with the historic traditions. The hotel welcomes its guests with such historic traditions plus all modern conveniences.

Built in wonderful scenery, in the centre of the lakeside area, next to Tagore Promenade and the port, the building complex offers a wide range of services for all who need an active rest, holiday or yachting.

****Hotel Golden Lake Resort Balatonfüred is a wellness and conference hotel with 58 double rooms including spare beds as required, with a balcony and view. From them there are 5 in the category standard, 30 medium, 23 plus, as well as 1 de lux junior suite and 8 de lux suites. Besides, the hotel capacity is regularly increased with de lux junior suites from the apart hotel of the complex.

We provide parking spaces subject to free capacity, on the basis of a prior written reservation. Please let us know your parking needs in advance!
The outdoor Swim spa jacuzzi is temporarily closed for maintenance.

hotels.name: Hotel Margaréta Balatonfüred
hotels.useful_info_json: [{"label": "Bus station", "distance": "200 m"}, {"label": "Restaurant", "distance": "550 m"}, {"label": "Train station", "distance": "1 km"}, {"label": "City center", "distance": "1.2 km"}]
hotels.payment_policy: The full balance is payable on arrival.
hotels.description:
The renewed Hotel Margaréta is located in Balatonfüred, directly at the main road Nr.71. Balatonfüred is a popular and continuously developing holiday resort at lake Balaton, next to the wonderful peninsula Tihany.

To finalise the booking your are required to pay 50% advance payment of the total amount within 3 days of our confirmation.
In case of a cancellation up to 14 days prior to arrival may result in a change of the arrival date or in a refund of the deposit after the deduction of a penalty fee of 3.000 HUF.

Tourist tax in 2025: 710 HUF/Person/Night (from 18 years).

We draw your attention that bookings for five rooms or more are considered as groop booking. The hotel applies different payment and canceling policies for groups, please contact us! If You do not accept our policies for groups, we cancel your booking free of charge.

Catering:
We would like to inform you that in order to ensure the comfort of our guests and the maximum hygiene conditions, breakfast and dinner can be held in shifts, depending on the occupancy of the hotel
Depending on the number of guests, we offer a buffet or a 3-course menu for breakfast and dinner.

The hotel has 65 air conditioned double rooms with balcony, shower, and including spare beds as required. There is one suite also, with 40 m2 basic area. All rooms are furnished with TV, refrigerator.
From the 65 rooms, 4 rooms are antiallergic. If you would like to stay some of them, please write your request in the comment.

The one hectare closed park provides possibility for safe car-parking. The garden is suited for sports and games, serving the needs of our guests.

SERVICES:
-CONFERENCES
Combine the pleasant with the useful!
Train your staff in our hotel by taking advantage of its three conference rooms!

We can ensure catering service as well.

Conference rooms:
- 2 rooms for 30 persons with internet access
- 1 room for 20 persons
We are waiting for your inquiry!

-DRINK BAR
Have a good time in the new drink bar of the Hotel! Wide range of drinks, favourable prices, and a wide-screen LCD TV for Your entertainment!

Other services in the Bar:
- Table Soccer
- Free wifi
- Large screen TV
Have a rest at the banks of the park while your children play on the safe playground!

-GARDEN PARTY
Celebrate the main events of your family and invite your fellow worker to have a rest!

-JADE STONE MASSAGEBED
Recreation and healing on favourable prices! Not only for the guest of Hotel Margaréta! 1 treatment = 40 minutes.

- BEAUTIFUL GARDEN POOL

Our services:
- Wellness area: 2 whirlpools, children's pool, light-salt and aromatherapy room, adventure showers
- Massage service for a fee.
- Jade stone massage bed, not only for Hotel Margaréta guests!
- Seasonal garden pool, sun beds, garden shower
- Drink Bar, including: big screen TV (sports broadcasts), table football
- Bicycle rental nearby
- Baby equipment (baby cot: 2.900 Ft/soft cot/night, potty, pushchair: 3.000 Ft/day, bottle warmer...)
- Outdoor parking: 2.200 Ft/car/night
- Bathrobes for adults: 2.100 Ft/piece

hotels.name: Anna Grand Hotel Balatonfüred
hotels.payment_policy: Payment policy: The full balance (or remaining amount after prepayment) is On departure day.
hotels.local_tax: Local tax: 710 Ft / person / night (1.86 € / person / night) of the reservation value (for guests aged 18), included in the full price and payable on site.(payable on site)
hotels.description: 105 comfortably furnished rooms are offered by Anna Grand Hotel Balatonfüred to guests looking for accommodation in Balatonfüred. The hotel offers chield-friendly services, which will assure a pleasant stay for the complete family. The hotel is happy to have you in the restaurant for a hearty lunch or a romantic dinner. In case you are arriving by car, you will have the opportunity to leave it in an own parking space of the hotel for an extra fee. Available wellness services will provide you the opportunity to refresh yourself, please take a look at the information sheet for the details. In some of the rooms air-conditioning is in operation, ensuring that you will be feeling good also on warm summer days (please make sure on the information sheet of the selected room). Wireless Internet connection (WiFi) is available at the hotel, enabling portable devices and smartphones to go online. An exact and detailed list of equipment in the rooms and of the services provided by Anna Grand Hotel Balatonfüred you will find on the information sheet below and on the information sheet of the individual rooms, including any applicable additional fees.
